## What does this PR do?

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] 🥋 New kata
- [ ] ⏱ New speedrun challenge
- [ ] 🔧 New / changed simulated git command
- [ ] 🎨 UI / UX improvement
- [ ] 📖 Documentation
- [ ] 🧹 Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] I edited `src/` (not the generated `dist/git-dojo.html`).
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally (engine tests, kata sim, and DOM smoke test).
- [ ] I ran `npm run build` so `dist/git-dojo.html` reflects my source changes.
- [ ] I added or updated a test covering my change (new command / kata / challenge).
- [ ] No runtime dependencies or network calls were introduced (offline-first).
